leadText: The Polar Biome (Japanese: ポーラエリア Polar Area) is a large biome within the Terarium, located in the Unova region's Blueberry Academy.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The polar biome has vast icy tundras and ice caps, with cold seas and large snowy mountains. Many ice-type Pokemon can be found roaming the land or swimming in the sea.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Chargestone Cavern 1.2 Polar Plaza 1.3 Polar Outdoor Classrooms 1.4 Polar Rest Area Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Chargestone Cavern [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Chargestone Cavern An entrance to Chargestone Cavern can be found in the center of the biome, at ground level. Polar Plaza [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Polar Plaza The Polar Plaza is located in the northwestern portion of the biome. The player can challenge Drayton of the BB League here. Polar Outdoor Classrooms [ edit | edit source ] Two outdoor classrooms can be found in the Polar Biome. One is located at ground level in the center of the biome near the entrance to Chargestone Cavern; the other is located south on the mountain near the border to the Canyon Biome . The outdoor classrooms becomes a stop for Flying Taxis once visited. Polar Rest Area [ edit | edit source ] A rest area is located in the northern portion of the biome. A guidance counselor is found here, who will reward the player for defeating Trainers in the Polar Biome. The player can heal their Pokémon here and purchase items from vending machines .
